misc: Loves basketball even more than Marcus, making some fans wonder if he's a real golfer
biography: Pasi, affectionately known as "Susi-Pasi", is a formidable competitor hailing from Vuosaari Golf Helsinki. While his dedication to golf is unquestionable, some observers whisper that his true passion lies with basketball, perhaps even more so than Marcus. This has led some fans to playfully question whether he is a 'real' golfer at all.

Having graced the fairways of the Hector Trophée on four occasions, Pasi has proven his mettle in this challenging tournament. In those four appearances, he has emerged victorious in the Hector Trophée once, demonstrating his ability to perform under pressure in the pairs format. While the Victor Trophy has eluded him thus far, his competitive spirit suggests that he will continue to strive for individual glory.

While he is not currently slated to participate in the upcoming Hector Trophée 2026, golf enthusiasts know that last-minute changes can always occur. Pasi's presence is always a welcome addition to any tournament, and his fans will be eagerly awaiting news of his future participation.
